Created attachment 208773
lingot 1.0.1

audio/lingot: Update to 1.0.1

 * Update to 1.0.1
 * Change gtk20 to gtk30
 * Add pulseaudio option
 * Move NLS/gettext as an option
 * Add FFTW option
 * Add cairo
 * Remove libglade2


 Changelog:

   https://savannah.nongnu.org/forum/forum.php?forum_id=9190

QA:

  * portlint: OK (looks fine.)
  * testport: OK (poudriere: 11/12/HEAD, i386/amd64, all options tested)
  * maketest: OK (rock n roll test PASS)
